hero.name: Hi, I'm Alex
hero.title: Web Designer & Developer
hero.subtitle: Assistant Director of Software Engineering
hero.tagline: Building things on the web that are fast, clean, and genuinely worth looking at.
hero.bio: I'm a web designer and developer with a background in engineering leadership. I build minimal, mobile-first sites that balance craft and function — from simple landing pages to integrated storefronts. When I'm not writing code at work, I'm working on personal projects or building sites for small businesses and people with ideas worth sharing.
